disagreement.question: In what year was the journal Russian Journal of Physical Chemistry A first published?
disagreement.response_a:
The journal *Russian Journal of Physical Chemistry A* was first published in **2007**.

This occurred when the English translation of the Russian journal *Zhurnal Fizicheskoi Khimii* (founded in 1930) split into two separate titles: *Russian Journal of Physical Chemistry A* and *Russian Journal of Physical Chemistry B*. The English translation series itself began in 1956 under the title *Russian Journal of Physical Chemistry*.
